name: Tuna and Rice Salad Provencale
recipeIngredient: 2 cups white beans, canned, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except lettuce and garnish in a large mixing bowl and toss thoroughly.
2. Cover and chill for several hours.
3. Line the salad bowl or platter with lettuce and mound the salad in the center.
4. Garnish with tomato wedges and hard-cooked eggs.
